codeReview.summary: Current HEAD matches the follow-up handoff: commit 36dec3c isolates test-only changes in tests/integration-live-data.test.ts and directly covers the remaining CeFi/DeFi coherence and compatibility-audit linkage assertions while preserving the previously added cross-area flows.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker used the core-api-worker skill even though features.json assigns compatibility-hardening-worker for this feature, so the specialized compatibility-hardening procedure was not the one actually followed in either transcript.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:1781-1800 assigns skillName=compatibility-hardening-worker for cross-area-integration-validation; worker-transcripts.jsonl lines 105-106 show Skill calls for mission-worker-base and core-api-worker instead.

summary: Pass. The review covered both handoffs, the transcript skeleton, commit 36dec3c, and current HEAD. The implementation is an isolated test-only change that now directly proves the remaining cross-area assertions without introducing scope creep; only a skill/procedure mismatch was noted as shared-state feedback.
